title: Mid-Level Radiologist at B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates:
B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates!
